name: disco
description: Discord activity CLI — read channels, threads, mentions, and search from the terminal

scripts.install-local: bun run build && mkdir -p "$HOME/.local/bin" && cp dist/disco "$HOME/.local/bin/disco"
scripts.make-icon: swift make-icon.swift dist/AppIcon.iconset && cp dist/AppIcon.iconset/icon_512x512.png assets/disco-logo.png
